name: Cream Cheese Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and cream cheese together at medium speed with an electric mixer for 2 minutes or until creamy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating for 5 to 7 minutes until well combined.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing just until the yellow color disappears.
4. Stir in vanilla extract.
5. Combine flour and salt; gradually add to butter mixture, stirring until just blended after each addition.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
7. Fill a 2-cup, ovenproof measuring cup with water and place it in the oven with the tube pan.
8. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 to 15 minutes.
10. Remove from the pan and cool completely on a wire rack.
